description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, predominantly black with vibrant, retro-themed artwork on its side panels. The side art features a dynamic space motif with colorful explosions and streaks, reminiscent of the iconic Asteroids arcade game. The front of the cabinet displays a control panel with multiple buttons and a joystick, designed for player interaction, and a coin slot below for inserting tokens or coins. Above the screen, a marquee with the 'ASTEROIDS' title and matching space-themed graphics is prominently displayed. The screen is set back within a bezel, typical of vintage arcade machines, and the overall structure is boxy with a slightly angled upper section for optimal viewing. The cabinet is constructed from wood or particleboard, with plastic and metal components for the controls and coin mechanism.
description: A vintage upright arcade game cabinet with bold space-themed artwork, a control panel with buttons and joystick, and a prominent 'ASTEROIDS' marquee. The cabinet is mostly black with colorful side graphics and a coin slot on the front.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the full space-themed artwork with colorful explosions and streaks on a black background.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'ASTEROIDS' marquee, control panel with buttons and joystick, screen, and coin slot.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with identical space-themed graphics and the cabinet's angular profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid black back panel with no visible artwork or features.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple buttons arranged in a row, featuring a colorful, patterned overlay
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'ASTEROIDS' title in bold yellow letters with a space and explosion motif, matching the side art's vibrant, retro theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Dynamic space-themed artwork with colorful explosions, streaks, and planetary motifs on a black background
